title: verbascum × nothum var. mosellanum
intro: Verbascum × nothum var. mosellanum, also known as the Mullein variety, is a hybrid plant derived from the Verbascum genus, which is a group of flowering plants in the figwort family. This plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, particularly in the treatment of respiratory issues such as bronchitis, coughs, and asthma due to its anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties. The health benefits of Verbascum × nothum var. mosellanum include its ability to soothe sore throats, reduce swelling, and promote relaxation. Herbal preparations of this plant include teas, infusions, and tinctures, often used to calm the respiratory system and promote overall well-being.
